meta_title: For Founders: client workflow to Solve can't finish projects (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Client Workflow to Solve Shipping Paralysis
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on SaaS builds. Learn an advanced client workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to ensure your MVP hits the market at lightning speed.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is a lack of rigorous, contract-based client workflows that force decision-making. By integrating Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative execution, you transform abstract requirements into locked-in technical specs, ensuring you deliver a high-value MVP instead of endless, unmarketable prototypes.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: your IDE is cluttered with half-baked features, your roadmap is a graveyard of abandoned ideas, and the 'shipping' date has been pushed back for the fourth time. You've fallen into the trap of endless iteration, where the complexity of your own ambition has suffocated your ability to deliver a product people will actually pay for.

But the graveyard of SaaS ideas isn't built on a lack of talent—it's built on a lack of process. By treating your client workflow as a rigid, automated pipeline rather than a series of suggestions, you reclaim your momentum. It is time to stop building in the dark and start engineering for revenue.

steps.title: Define the Revenue-Generating MVP Scope
steps.description: Establish a strict contract of what constitutes 'done' for the first release. Focus on one core problem, one solution, and one payment gateway.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this project scope. Identify the top 20% of features that deliver 80% of user value and draft a strict project contract that excludes 'nice-to-have' features.

steps.title: Automate Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a production-ready repository structure that enforces separation of concerns, preventing technical debt from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a robust SaaS architecture using Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe. Include modular service layers and strict TypeScript interfaces.

steps.title: Implement Test-Driven Feature Loops
steps.description: Force the code to meet requirements before it is merged. Use Claude Code to ensure every new feature passes a defined test suite.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate unit tests for the authentication and payment service layers based on the previously defined project contract.

steps.title: Execute Rapid Iteration Cycles
steps.description: Use Claude Code to automate the implementation of the core business logic, ensuring the code remains clean and aligned with the architectural blueprint.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this service module to implement the payment flow, ensuring strict error handling and database state synchronization.

steps.title: Finalize Deployment and Monetization
steps.description: Automate the transition from local development to production, ensuring your environment is ready for real users and payment processing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase for security vulnerabilities and production readiness. Provide a checklist for deployment.

pro_tips: Never build without a 'kill-switch' flag; if a feature takes more than 4 hours, kill it and simplify the requirement.
Use Claude Code to generate documentation as you write code, not after, to avoid drift between specs and reality.
Always force database schema migrations to be generated by AI to ensure they match your application logic exactly.
Treat your client workflow as a product itself: if a step is tedious, automate it before writing another line of code.
Focus on the 'Happy Path' for your first 10 users; ignore edge cases until you have your first paying customer.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, implement a feedback loop by integrating user analytics and setting up a weekly sprint cycle to address user-reported friction points.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your ambition outpace your execution. Build, ship, and get paid with a workflow designed for Founders who value speed and scale. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
